businessDescription: Wholesale supplier of food and beverages to restaurants, canteens, and retailers.
Nagdi-distribute kami ng mga pagkain at inumin sa bulk sa mga tindahan.
Bulk food and beverage distributor to convenience stores and karinderias.
Maliit na tindahan sa barangay na nagbebenta ng bigas, de-lata, at noodles.
Neighborhood sari-sari store with load and prepaid; sells snacks and toiletries.
We operate a fishpond for tilapia and milkfish sold to markets.
Aquaculture: tilapia at bangus para sa palengke at restaurants.
Clinic with doctor and dentist; check-up, vaccination, and dental extraction.
Medical and dental clinic sa barangay; primary care at tooth cleaning.
We grow palay, corn, and vegetables; sell to palengke and traders.
Crop farming ng palay at gulay para ibenta sa market.
Plumbing contractor: water lines, septic tank, and drainage installation.
Nag-i-install kami ng plumbing at aircon sa residential at commercial.
Trucking business delivering goods and materials to construction and factories.
Nagha-hatid kami ng kargamento by truck sa mga provinces.
Hauling of sand, gravel, cement, and hollow blocks to construction sites.
